name: FeatureFlags
desc: Core class for using Mixpanel Feature Flags.

name: areFlagsReady
desc: Check if feature flags have been loaded and are ready to use.

name: getVariant
desc: Get the full variant for a feature flag, including metadata.

name: getVariantValue
desc: Get just the value of a feature flag.

name: isEnabled
desc: Check if a boolean feature flag is enabled.

name: loadFlags
desc:
Manually triggers a fresh fetch of feature flag variant assignments
from Mixpanel servers.

name: updateContext
desc: Update the context used for feature flag evaluation.

name: FeatureFlagsConfig
desc: Configuration options for feature flags.

name: context
desc:
Context properties to send with feature flag requests.
These can be used for targeting and segmentation.

name: enabled
desc: Whether feature flags are enabled.

name: toMap
desc: Converts this config to a Map for serialization.

name: Mixpanel
desc: The primary class for integrating Mixpanel with your app.

name: addGroup
desc: Add a group to this user's membership for a particular group key

name: alias
desc:
The alias method creates an alias which Mixpanel will use to remap one id to another.
Multiple aliases can point to the same identifier.

name: clearSuperProperties
desc: Erase all currently registered superProperties.

name: deleteGroup
desc: Permanently deletes this group's record from Group Analytics.

name: eventElapsedTime
desc: Retrieves the time elapsed for the named event since timeEvent() was called.

name: flush
desc: Push all queued Mixpanel events and People Analytics changes to Mixpanel servers.

name: getDistinctId
desc:
Returns the current distinct id of the user.
This is either the id automatically generated by the library or the id that has been passed by a call to identify().

name: getFeatureFlags
desc: Returns a FeatureFlags object that can be used to access feature flag values and metadata.

name: getGroup
desc:
Returns a MixpanelGroup object that can be used to set and increment
Group Analytics properties.

name: getPeople
desc:
Returns a Mixpanel People object that can be used to set and increment
People Analytics properties.

name: getSuperProperties
desc: Returns a Map of the user's current super properties

name: hasOptedOutTracking
desc:
Will return true if the user has opted out from tracking.
return true if user has opted out from tracking. Defaults to false.

name: identify
desc:
Associate all future calls to track() with the user identified by
the given distinct id.

name: init
desc: Initializes an instance of the API with the given project token.

name: optInTracking
desc:
Use this method to n
opt-in an already opted-out user from tracking. People updates and track
calls will be sent to Mixpanel after using this method.
This method will internally track an opt-in event to your project.

name: optOutTracking
desc:
Use this method to opt-out a user from tracking. Events and people updates that haven't been
flushed yet will be deleted. Use flush() before calling this method if you want
to send all the queues to Mixpanel before.

name: registerSuperProperties
desc: Register properties that will be sent with every subsequent call to track().

name: registerSuperPropertiesOnce
desc:
Register super properties for events, only if no other super property with the
same names has already been registered.

name: removeGroup
desc: Remove a group from this user's membership for a particular group key

name: reset
desc:
Clear super properties and generates a new random distinctId for this instance.
Useful for clearing data when a user logs out.

name: setFlushBatchSize
desc:
Set the number of events sent in a single network request to the Mixpanel server.
By configuring this value, you can optimize network usage and manage the frequency of communication between the client
and the server. The maximum size is 50; any value over 50 will default to 50.

name: setGroup
desc: Set the group this user belongs to.

name: setLoggingEnabled
desc:
This allows enabling or disabling of all Mixpanel logs at run time.
All logging is disabled by default. Usually, this is only required if
you are running into issues with the SDK that you want to debug

name: setServerURL
desc:
Set the base URL used for Mixpanel API requests.
Useful if you need to proxy Mixpanel requests. Defaults to https://api.mixpanel.com.
To route data to Mixpanel's EU servers, set to https://api-eu.mixpanel.com

name: setUseIpAddressForGeolocation
desc:
This controls whether to automatically send the client IP Address as part of event tracking.
With an IP address, geo-location is possible down to neighborhoods within a city,
although the Mixpanel Dashboard will just show you city level location specificity.

name: timeEvent
desc:
Begin timing of an event. Calling timeEvent("Thing") will not send an event, but
when you eventually call track("Thing"), your tracked event will be sent with a "$duration"
property, representing the number of seconds between your calls.

name: track
desc: Track an event.

name: trackWithGroups
desc: Track an event with specific groups.

name: unregisterSuperProperty
desc: Remove a single superProperty, so that it will not be sent with future calls to track().

name: MixpanelFlagVariant
desc: Represents a feature flag variant with metadata.

name: MixpanelFlagVariant.fallback
desc: Creates a fallback MixpanelFlagVariant with the given key and value.

name: MixpanelFlagVariant.fromMap
desc: Creates a MixpanelFlagVariant from a Map (used for platform channel deserialization).

name: experimentId
desc: The experiment ID if this flag is part of an experiment.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: isExperimentActive
desc: Whether the experiment is currently active.

name: isQaTester
desc: Whether the current user is a QA tester.

name: key
desc: The key/name of the feature flag.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: toMap
desc: Converts this variant to a Map for serialization.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: value
desc:
The value of the feature flag variant.
Can be any type: bool, String, int, double, Map, List, etc.

name: MixpanelGroup
desc: Core class for using Mixpanel Group Analytics features.

name: remove
desc:
Remove value from a list-valued property only if it is already present in the list.
If the property does not currently exist, the remove will be ignored.
If the property exists and is not list-valued, the remove will be ignored.

name: set
desc:
Sets a single property with the given name and value for this group.
The given name and value will be assigned to the user in Mixpanel Group Analytics,
possibly overwriting an existing property with the same name.

name: setOnce
desc: Works just like groupSet() except it will not overwrite existing property values. This is useful for properties like "First login date".

name: union
desc:
Adds values to a list-valued property only if they are not already present in the list.
If the property does not currently exist, it will be created with the given list as its value.
If the property exists and is not list-valued, the union will be ignored.

name: unset
desc: Permanently removes the property with the given name from the group's profile

name: People
desc: Core class for using Mixpanel People Analytics features.

name: append
desc:
Appends a value to a list-valued property. If the property does not currently exist,
it will be created as a list of one element. If the property does exist and doesn't
currently have a list value, the append will be ignored.

name: clearCharges
desc: Permanently clear the whole transaction history for the identified people profile.

name: deleteUser
desc: Permanently deletes the identified user's record from People Analytics.

name: increment
desc:
Add the given amount to an existing property on the identified user. If the user does not already
have the associated property, the amount will be added to zero. To reduce a property,
provide a negative number for the value.

name: remove
desc:
Remove value from a list-valued property only if they are already present in the list.
If the property does not currently exist, the remove will be ignored.
If the property exists and is not list-valued, the remove will be ignored.

name: set
desc:
Sets a single property with the given name and value for this user.
The given name and value will be assigned to the user in Mixpanel People Analytics,
possibly overwriting an existing property with the same name.

name: setOnce
desc: Works just like set(), except it will not overwrite existing property values. This is useful for properties like "First login date".

name: trackCharge
desc: Track a revenue transaction for the identified people profile.

name: union
desc:
Adds values to a list-valued property only if they are not already present in the list.
If the property does not currently exist, it will be created with the given list as it's value.
If the property exists and is not list-valued, the union will be ignored.

name: unset
desc: permanently removes the property with the given name from the user's profile

name: MixpanelFlutterPlugin
desc: A web implementation of the MixpanelFlutter plugin.

name: handleMethodCall
desc:
Handles method calls over the MethodChannel of this plugin.
Note: Check the "federated" architecture for a new way of doing this:
https://flutter.dev/go/federated-plugins

name: safeJsify
desc: Safely converts Dart values to JavaScript-compatible types for web interop.

name: MixpanelMessageCodec
desc:
The codec utilized to encode data back and forth between
the Dart application and the native platform.

name: MixpanelMessageCodec.new
desc: Constructor.

name: readValueOfType
desc: Reads a value of the indicated type from buffer.

name: writeValue
desc:
Writes value to buffer by first writing a type discriminator
byte, then the value itself.
